Creative engineering

I design like a storyteller and build like an owner.

The work lives in the overlap between bold visual direction and dependable implementation, so the final result feels distinctive without becoming fragile.

4Flagship case studies
3D + MotionExperience design bias
End-to-endBuild ownership
Point of view

I care most about interfaces that earn attention fast, then keep proving their value through clarity, motion discipline, and real frontend depth.

I like product surfaces that feel immersive from the first second but still communicate value clearly. That balance matters more than decoration.

Most of my best work happens where experience design, frontend systems, and product thinking overlap: landing pages, SaaS experiences, interactive tools, and branded portfolio environments.

My process is collaborative and highly visual, but the build quality stays serious. Motion, performance, maintainability, and accessibility are part of the design conversation from the start.

How I work

Art direction, interaction design, and frontend systems treated as one discipline.

Narrative before ornament

Every screen should guide attention, explain value, and create momentum before any visual effect starts asking for attention.

Motion with product purpose

Animations should reinforce hierarchy, depth, and trust, not just make a layout feel busy or expensive.

Build quality that survives launch

The final interface has to stay modular, performant, and editable, because premium visuals only matter when the foundation is serious.

Immersive product interfaces3D-enhanced web experiencesHigh-conversion landing systemsReact architectureApplied AI product UXPerformance-focused implementation
Selected Work

Case studies framed like an art-directed product exhibition.

The projects are rebuilt around hierarchy, image clarity, and stronger editorial rhythm so each one reads like a real product story instead of a generic portfolio tile.

Curator note

One flagship story leads the section, then the supporting work follows in a tighter bento-style composition with clearer framing, richer proof, and a stronger sense of premium craft.

From product stories to systems thinking
Skills visualization

A live constellation of the tools and practices behind the work.

Instead of another static logo grid, this section maps the stack as a network of related capabilities: frontend craft, motion, backend structure, and AI-aware product thinking.

Current focus

React

React sits inside the frontend layer of the stack and supports the kind of immersive product work shown throughout this portfolio.

FrontendHover or focus other nodes to inspect the constellation.

Design with conviction

Every section should feel intentionally art-directed instead of assembled from familiar portfolio templates.

Animate with meaning

Motion should reveal hierarchy, reinforce depth, and reward interaction without becoming visual noise.

Build for delivery

The codebase has to stay modular, editable, and resilient enough for real production work after the visual wow fades.

Experience timeline

A horizontal narrative of what I've been building and where the craft is heading.

This section uses a pinned horizontal motion system on desktop to feel more like moving through a gallery than jumping between static blocks.

2026

Wandrly Product Build

Built a modern AI travel product with collaboration roles, shareable trip workspaces, and real planning utilities beyond itinerary generation.

2025

AI Tooling Experiments

Explored developer-facing AI product interfaces and workflow design through prototypes like DevCompanion.

2025

Commerce and Dashboard Systems

Focused on structured UX systems across storefronts, admin logic, and support workflow interfaces.

Ongoing

Motion-Driven Frontend Craft

Pushing deeper into interactive storytelling, 3D atmosphere, and premium web presentation systems.

DiscoverBuildRefineShip

High-trust signals presented with the same care as the rest of the work.

I kept this section abstract but premium so it supports the experience without feeling like stock testimonial clutter.

There is a clear sense of craft in the motion, but the structure underneath is equally thoughtful.

High-trust contact

Let's build something sharp, immersive, and impossible to ignore.

Whether you need a portfolio, SaaS marketing site, product interface, or a custom interactive web experience, I can help shape it from concept to polished build.

Clarity firstClear goals, strong references, and honest feedback lead to the best build.
Premium deliveryMotion, responsiveness, and maintainable implementation are treated as one system.
ResponseTypical response time: within 24 hours.
